title: Static FIA dashboard figures and aggregates
description: PNG figures and compact JSON/CSV aggregates generated from local FIA summary parquets. The dashboard prefers the aggregates for interactive Plotly rendering and falls back to PNGs when parquets are unavailable.

figures.title: FIA plot filters and disturbance flags
figures.description: Percent of plot visits flagged by exclusion and disturbance fields.

figures.title: Clean and excluded FIA plot locations
figures.description: Sampled FIA plot locations after joining plot filters to coordinates.

figures.title: Live basal area at FIA plot locations
figures.description: Sampled FIA plot locations colored by live basal area.

figures.title: FIA forest structure distributions
figures.description: Live basal area and BA-weighted Shannon diversity distributions.

figures.title: Disturbance events by category
figures.description: FIA disturbance-history records grouped into natural disturbance categories.

figures.title: Fire type breakdown
figures.description: FIA fire disturbance records by disturbance label.

figures.title: Top FIA disturbance types
figures.description: The 20 most common FIA disturbance labels.

figures.title: Disturbance event locations
figures.description: Sampled FIA disturbance events by category.

figures.title: Top 20 damage agents
figures.description: Damage agents ranked by summed affected trees per acre.

figures.title: Basal area affected by damage category
figures.description: Summed affected basal area by FIA damage-agent category.

figures.title: Damage category by state
figures.description: State by damage-agent-category heatmap using log1p affected TPA.

figures.title: Damage agent locations
figures.description: Sampled FIA plots with damage-agent records by category.

data.name: flag_rates
data.description: Plot-filter and disturbance flag rates (percent of plot visits).

data.name: pct_forested_hist
data.description: pct_forested histogram (forested fraction per plot visit).

data.name: plot_status_points
data.description: Sampled clean/excluded plot points for interactive plotting.

data.name: plot_tree_points
data.description: Sampled FIA plot locations with live BA, Shannon H, and species richness for interactive maps.

data.name: ba_live_hist
data.description: Live basal-area histogram (clipped at 99th percentile).

data.name: shannon_h_hist
data.description: Shannon diversity histogram (BA-weighted, clipped at 99th percentile).

data.name: state_softwood_hardwood_ba
data.description: Mean softwood/hardwood basal area per state.

data.name: state_size_class_ba
data.description: Mean basal area per state by tree size class.

data.name: disturbance_category_counts
data.description: FIA disturbance-history record counts grouped by category.

data.name: fire_type_breakdown
data.description: Fire-type record counts within FIA disturbance history.

data.name: disturbance_year_counts
data.description: Year x category counts of FIA disturbance records (1950-2025).

data.name: top_disturbance_types
data.description: Top 20 disturbance labels with category and record count.

data.name: disturbance_event_points
data.description: Sampled disturbance event points (lat/lon/category/label).

data.name: damage_agent_top20
data.description: Top 20 damage agents ranked by summed affected TPA.

data.name: agent_category_ba
data.description: Summed affected basal area per FIA damage-agent category.

data.name: agent_state_heatmap
data.description: Long-format damage-agent category x state x summed TPA.

data.name: damage_agent_points
data.description: Sampled FIA plots with damage-agent points by category.

data.name: mortality_by_agent
data.description: Mortality TPA by inferred agent label and component_type.

data.name: state_mortality
data.description: Summed mortality TPA per state and component_type.

data.name: state_seedlings
data.description: Summed softwood/hardwood seedling counts per state.

data.name: state_seedling_diversity
data.description: Mean seedling Shannon diversity per state.

data.name: treatment_label_counts
data.description: Record counts by treatment label and category.

data.name: state_treatments
data.description: Treatment record counts per state and category.

data.name: treatment_year_counts
data.description: Treatment year x category counts.
